name: Strawberry Yogurt Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 1/2 quart saucepan, sprinkle gelatin over water to soften for about minutes.
2. In a 1-cup measure, beat together milk and yolks until blended; add to the gelatin mixture.
3. Over low heat, stir constantly with a wide rubber spatula, especially around the side of the pan, until gelatin is dissolved.
4. Cool at room temperature.
5. In a medium bowl, gradually beat together cream cheese, honey, orange rind, and vanilla extract. Gently beat in yogurt until smooth.
6. Chill until very slightly thickened.
7. Turn into graham cracker shell; chill to set.
8. At serving time, cover the surface with strawberries.
Serves 6.
